Malaria.description: A mosquito-borne infectious disease caused by Plasmodium parasites.
Malaria.recommendation: Seek immediate medical attention. Antimalarial medication required.

Pneumonia.description: An infection that inflames the air sacs in one or both lungs.
Pneumonia.recommendation: Visit a doctor immediately. May require antibiotics or hospitalisation.

Flu.description: A contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses.
Flu.recommendation: Rest, stay hydrated, and consider antiviral medication if severe.

Food Poisoning.description: Illness caused by eating contaminated, spoiled, or toxic food.
Food Poisoning.recommendation: Stay hydrated. Seek medical care if symptoms persist beyond 48 hours.

Typhoid.description: A bacterial infection caused by Salmonella typhi spread through contaminated food or water.
Typhoid.recommendation: Requires antibiotic treatment. Consult a doctor immediately.

Common Cold.description: A viral infection of the upper respiratory tract.
Common Cold.recommendation: Rest, fluids, and over-the-counter medication for symptom relief.
